sentences.target: Es un día típico en verano.

translations.es: Es un día típico en verano.
translations.en: It’s a typical day in summer.
translations.fr: C’est une journée typique en été.
translations.de: Es ist ein typischer Tag im Sommer.
translations.yue: 呢個係夏天典型嘅一日。
translations.pt: É um dia típico no verão.
translations.vi: Đó là một ngày điển hình vào mùa hè.
translations.nl: Het is een typische dag in de zomer.
translations.hi: यह गर्मियों का एक सामान्य दिन है।
translations.el: Είναι μια τυπική μέρα το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Det er en typisk dag om sommeren.
translations.id: Ini hari yang khas di musim panas.
translations.sv: Det är en typisk dag på sommaren.
translations.cs: Je to typický den v létě.
translations.da: Det er en typisk dag om sommeren.
translations.ja: 夏の典型的な一日です。

tokens.explanation: Copular verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular, linking the subject to the predicate.
Indefinite article modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, singular, functioning as the head of the noun phrase.
Adjective modifying the noun 'día'; agrees in gender and number with the noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a locative/temporal prepositional phrase.
Common noun, singular, object of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Mi barrio tiene un mercado típico.

translations.es: Mi barrio tiene un mercado típico.
translations.en: My neighborhood has a typical market.
translations.fr: Mon quartier a un marché typique.
translations.de: Mein Viertel hat einen typischen Markt.
translations.it: Il mio quartiere ha un mercato tipico.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的社区有一个典型的市场。
translations.yue: 我個社區有個典型嘅街市。
translations.ru: В моем районе есть типичный рынок.
translations.pt: O meu bairro tem um mercado típico.
translations.vi: Khu phố của tôi có một khu chợ đặc trưng.
translations.nl: Mijn buurt heeft een typische markt.
translations.uk: У моєму районі є типовий ринок.
translations.hu: A környékemen van egy tipikus piac.
translations.hi: मेरे मोहल्ले में एक पारंपरिक बाज़ार है।
translations.pl: W mojej okolicy jest typowy targ.
translations.el: Η γειτονιά μου έχει μια τυπική αγορά.
translations.nb: Nabolaget mitt har et typisk marked.
translations.sv: Mitt område har en typisk marknad.
translations.ro: Cartierul meu are o piață tipică.
translations.da: Mit kvarter har et typisk marked.
translations.ja: 私の近所には典型的な市場があります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'barrio'.
Common noun, singular, serving as the subject of the clause.
Main verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, singular, functioning as the direct object of 'tiene'.
Adjective modifying 'mercado'; agrees with the noun it describes.

translations.en: Having breakfast late is typical here.
translations.fr: Prendre le petit-déjeuner tard est typique ici.
translations.de: Spät zu frühstücken ist hier typisch.
translations.it: Fare colazione tardi è tipico qui.
translations.ko: 여기서는 아침을 늦게 먹는 게 흔해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在这里，晚吃早餐很常见。
translations.yue: 喺呢度，遲啲食早餐好常見。
translations.pt: Tomar o pequeno-almoço tarde é típico aqui.
translations.he: לאכול ארוחת בוקר מאוחר זה טיפוסי כאן.
translations.vi: Ăn sáng muộn là điều điển hình ở đây.
translations.hi: यहाँ देर से नाश्ता करना आम है।
translations.el: Εδώ είναι συνηθισμένο να τρώμε αργά πρωινό.
translations.nb: Det er typisk her å spise sen frokost.
translations.id: Sarapan siang itu khas di sini.
translations.sv: Det är typiskt här att äta sen frukost.
translations.ro: Aici este tipic să mănânci micul dejun târziu.
translations.da: Det er typisk her at spise sen morgenmad.
translations.fi: Täällä on tyypillistä syödä myöhäinen aamiainen.
translations.ja: ここでは朝食を遅く食べるのが普通です。

tokens.explanation: Infinitive verb used as the subject-like clause/theme of the sentence.
Adverb modifying the verb 'desayunar', indicating time/manner.
Copular verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Predicative adjective complement of the copula 'es', expressing a characteristic.
Adverb of place modifying the clause, indicating location.

sentences.target: Ese ruido es típico por la noche.
sentences.reading: /ˈese ˈrwiðo es ˈtipiko poɾ la ˈnotʃe/

translations.es: Ese ruido es típico por la noche.
translations.ipa: /ˈese ˈrwiðo es ˈtipiko poɾ la ˈnotʃe/
translations.en: That noise is typical at night.
translations.fr: Ce bruit est typique la nuit.
translations.it: Quel rumore è tipico di notte.
translations.zh-Hans: 那种噪音在夜里很常见。
translations.yue: 嗰種噪音喺夜晚好常見。
translations.pt: Esse barulho é típico à noite.
translations.vi: Tiếng ồn đó thường xảy ra vào ban đêm.
translations.hi: वह शोर रात में आम है।
translations.el: Αυτός ο θόρυβος είναι συνηθισμένος τη νύχτα.
translations.nb: Den lyden er typisk om natten.
translations.id: Suara itu khas pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Det där ljudet är typiskt på natten.
translations.cs: Ten hluk je v noci typický.
translations.da: Den lyd er typisk om natten.
translations.ja: その音は夜によくあるものです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun 'ruido'.
Common noun, singular, serving as the subject of the clause.
Copular verb in the present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Predicative adjective complement of 'es'.
Preposition introducing a temporal phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, modifying the noun that follows.
Common noun, singular, object of the preposition 'por'.
